title: BEO Harness Change Proposal
description: Proposal from a delivery agent to modify BEO control-plane files (harness). Only beo-author may apply the change.

proposal_id.description: Unique proposal ID, generated as prop-<sha1 prefix>

source_issue_id.description: The delivery bead issue that generated this proposal

target.description: BEO control-plane file path (relative to repo root, under skills/beo/). Must start with 'skills/beo/' per kernel §10 Harness Mutation Guardrails.

rationale.description: Why this change helps delivery — what problem it solves

proposed_diff.description: Unified diff or clear before/after description of the change

safety_note.description: What could break, what invariants are affected, rollback consideration
